athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

base_date.description: Optional athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD base date. Defaults to today's date from the athlete timezone, not UTC or the chat client's timezone.

offsets.description: Integer day offsets from base_date. 0 is the base date, 1 is tomorrow, 7 is one week later, and negative values look backward. Each date is computed in the athlete timezone with calendar-day arithmetic.
